inlayHintPatterns.label: specificity: (${id}, ${class}, ${type})
inlayHintPatterns.description: Displays the computed specificity of a CSS selector as an (ID, Class, Type) tuple. Helps understand cascade priority.

inlayHintPatterns.label: ■ ${color}
inlayHintPatterns.description: Shows a color swatch preview inline after hex color values for visual identification.

inlayHintPatterns.label: ${rem}rem
inlayHintPatterns.description: Displays the rem equivalent of pixel values (assumes 16px base). Example: 24px → 1.5rem.

inlayHintPatterns.label: ${px}px
inlayHintPatterns.description: Displays the pixel equivalent of rem values (assumes 16px base). Example: 1.5rem → 24px.

inlayHintPatterns.label: ↑${top} →${right} ↓${bottom} ←${left}
inlayHintPatterns.description: Expands margin shorthand to show computed values for each side (top, right, bottom, left).

inlayHintPatterns.label: ↑${top} →${right} ↓${bottom} ←${left}
inlayHintPatterns.description: Expands padding shorthand to show computed values for each side (top, right, bottom, left).

inlayHintPatterns.label: stacking layer: ${level}
inlayHintPatterns.description: Indicates the relative stacking layer of the z-index value within the current stacking context.

inlayHintPatterns.label: ⏱ ${totalDuration}
inlayHintPatterns.description: Shows the total transition duration including delay for quick reference.

inlayHintPatterns.label: ⏱ ${duration} × ${iterations}
inlayHintPatterns.description: Shows animation duration and iteration count for quick reference.

inlayHintPatterns.label: ${count} columns
inlayHintPatterns.description: Shows the number of grid columns generated by repeat() for easier visualization.

inlayHintPatterns.label: min: ${1}, preferred: ${2}, max: ${3}
inlayHintPatterns.description: Breaks down clamp() function parameters for fluid font-size declarations.

typeInferenceRules.specificity: Computed as (count of #id selectors, count of .class/:pseudo-class/[attribute] selectors, count of element/::pseudo-element selectors)
typeInferenceRules.pxToRem: Divide pixel value by 16 (default browser font-size)
typeInferenceRules.shorthandExpansion: 1 value = all sides; 2 values = vertical|horizontal; 3 values = top|horizontal|bottom; 4 values = top|right|bottom|left
